content:
- Started from TO BE VERIFIED state for bug task `.ralph/tasks/bugs/pginfo-standby-polling-test-configure-primary-db-error.md` and ran a deep skeptical verification pass.
- Modified the execution plan (added stronger 30x flake loop + stale-report reconciliation) and switched marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Executed plan end-to-end with evidence under `.ralph/evidence/pginfo-standby-polling-test-configure-primary-db-error/`.
- Results: target pginfo standby test passed directly, companion pginfo test passed, 30/30 stress loop passed, and full gates passed sequentially (`make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`).
- Verified reported error text is stale against current source; no Rust code changes required. Updated task file with closure evidence and set `<status>done</status> <passes>true</passes> <passing>true</passing>`.
- Ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh`, appended a new cross-task learning to AGENTS.md, and now need to commit all files with required message format and quit.

- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md fully and enumerated all active tasks.
- Applied bug-first rule first: found multiple bug tasks with <passes>false</passes>, so non-bug and meta-task selection was skipped.
- Checked bug task files for explicit <priority> tags/blockers; none set, so chose highest-impact policy-violating bug: .ralph/tasks/bugs/bug-remove-unwrap-panic-allow.md.
- Wrote selected task path into .ralph/current_task.txt and stopped per instructions.

- Read startup memory via .ralph/progress_read.sh and loaded active task from .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Opened `.ralph/tasks/bugs/bug-remove-unwrap-panic-allow.md`; it was in initial state with no verification/execution marker.
- Ran broad parallel exploration scans (multi-command parallel): lint-allow search, unwrap/expect/panic search, and per-file reads for all `src/test_harness/*` modules.
- Confirmed key risk areas: crate-level allow in test_harness/mod.rs, panic-heavy test blocks in mod.rs/namespace.rs/pg16.rs, and panicing binary lookup in binaries.rs.
- Wrote a full, file-by-file execution plan into the task file, including remediation strategy, verification searches, full gate sequence, and completion bookkeeping.
- Appended `TO BE VERIFIED` at end of plan exactly per workflow and stopped before making code changes.
- Next step for next context window: perform deep skeptical verification of this plan, force at least one concrete plan change, then switch marker to NOW EXECUTE.
